title: Formula Column Max code limit / Not in numerical order

posts.author: nlopez1907 (Berto )
posts.cookedHtml:
So after building a 1650 line formula for all zip codes inside of Massachusetts we find out that Monday has a limit on how many lines it can take. 1000 lines. So question 1 is can we get a larger limit to fit the code that was already built and question 2 is why if we use two formula columns would one be in numerical order and the other is not? we cant get column with the first set of zones to show correctly. any help with this matter is greatly appreciated.
